content: Backend: add ADMIN_EMAILS config + apply_admin_role helper
Backend: refactor calendar_service to support custom scopes + custom callback path for sign-in flow
Backend: add /auth/google/login/start (unauth) + /auth/google/login/callback endpoints with find-or-create user, optional calendar scope, JWT issuance
Backend: apply ADMIN_EMAILS check in register/login/google-login + create grant_admin.py CLI
Frontend: add getGoogleLoginUrl helper in lib/api.js
Frontend: add 'Continue with Google' button + 'Also connect my calendar' checkbox to Login.jsx
Frontend: add 'Continue with Google' button to Register.jsx
Frontend: create /auth/callback route (AuthCallback.jsx) that reads hash fragment, persists token, redirects
i18n: add new auth keys to en.json and he.json
Smoke test: backend endpoints + frontend flow with screenshot tool
